themes.reasoning_notes: Repeatable tap ability suppresses opposing attackers/blockers; classic board-control piece on a cheap body.
Can create combat time-walks by tapping key creatures each turn, but it is more persistent control than pure tempo.
Repeatable activated tap effect can lock down key attackers or blockers over multiple turns; a classic white board-control utility creature.
Tapping one creature each turn can swing races or force through attacks, but the card plays more as ongoing control than dedicated tempo.
